title: Just in Time (JIT)
summary: 9609 AS — JIT principles, requirements, and benefits/risks.

simpleExplanation.title: Materials arrive exactly when needed
simpleExplanation.summary: JIT minimises inventory by synchronising deliveries with production. It cuts holding costs but needs reliable suppliers.

sections.content: **JIT** (4.2.2) contrasts **4.2.1 buffer stock**. Toyota is the classic **case reference**.
